title: Managed agents get improved tool orchestration for enterprise workflows
summary_raw: A new release improves agent orchestration, tool reliability, and workflow structure for business use cases.

title: Clinical memory layer adds audit-friendly recall for patient workflows
summary_raw: The system focuses on structured memory, traceability, and safer recall inside clinical workflows.

title: Voice assistant update improves speech handling and reminder flows
summary_raw: The release adds better voice interaction, reminder timing, and assistant response quality.
